trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The Mosquito can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Buzz
entries: Any creature within 10 ft of the Mosquito need to make a Constitution saving throw or lose their {@status Concentration|XPHB} if they have it active, if the target succeeds the saving throw they are immune to the Buzz ability for the next 24 hours

trait.name: Insect
entries: The Mosquito can occupy another creatures' space and vice versa

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 0 ft., one target. {@h} 1 piercing damage.
Did you know that only female mosquitos drink blood to breed, the male mosquitos usually eat fruits, these statblocks can be used for other creatures like a tick or house fly.
Familiar:you can summon a mosquito using the Haunting Mosquito spell
